subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Kingdom! It is evident that thou art spending thy days in South Africa, engaged in service to mankind [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی بملکوت چنین معلوم است که در جنوب افریکی ایامی بسر میبری و بخدمت عالم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @attaining the life of the spirit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
